relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains loan repayment schedule data (financial product details, payment schedules, balances), while the outbound file contains complaint escalation data (fraud indicators, regulatory flags, compliance actions). These represent fundamentally different business domains with no meaningful field overlap. The inbound file has no complaint, fraud, or escalation concepts, and the outbound file has no loan or repayment concepts. While both files share customer_id and customer_name fields, this alone is insufficient to establish data lineage—these are common identifiers across many systems. The message types serve entirely different purposes: one is operational loan management, the other is compliance/risk management.
